input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.10.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.10.1.1
            TITLE: course design

            CONTENT:
            rule D.10.1.1: Course Design
D.10.1.1 Course Design 
• Two pairs of concentric circles in a figure of eight pattern 
• Centers of the circles  18.25 m apart 
• Inner circles   15.25 m in diameter 
• Outer circles   21.25 m in diameter 
• Driving path   the 3.0 m wide path between the inner and outer circles
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 131 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Course Design • Two pairs of concentric circles in a figure of eight pattern • Centers of the circles 18.25 m apart • Inner circles 15.25 m in diameter • Outer circles 21.25 m in diameter • Driving path the 3.0 m wide path between the inner and outer circles
